modmenu.descriptionTranslation.hallowed: A Dark Souls-inspired death and resurrection system for Minecraft.
hallowed.restriction.generic: You cannot do that while Hallowed.
hallowed.restriction.block_break: You cannot break blocks while Hallowed.
hallowed.restriction.block_place: You cannot place blocks while Hallowed.
hallowed.restriction.container: You cannot open containers while Hallowed.
hallowed.restriction.item_use: You cannot use items while Hallowed.
hallowed.restriction.item_drop: You cannot drop items while Hallowed.
hallowed.restriction.item_pickup: You cannot pick up items while Hallowed.
hallowed.restriction.ride: You cannot ride entities while Hallowed.
hallowed.restriction.bed: You cannot use beds while Hallowed.
hallowed.restriction.weapon: You cannot attack with a weapon while Hallowed.
hallowed.restriction.hostile_only: You can only attack hostile mobs while Hallowed.
hallowed.restriction.xp: You cannot gain XP while Hallowed.
hallowed.resurrection.fail.not_hallowed: You are not in the Hallowed state.
hallowed.resurrection.fail.not_at_bonfir: You must be at a lit Bonfire to resurrect.
hallowed.resurrection.fail.delay: You must wait %d more seconds before you can be resurrected.
hallowed.resurrection.fail.concurrent: Another resurrection is already in progress.
hallowed.resurrection.offline: %s will be resurrected on next login.
hallowed.gui.resurrection.title: Resurrections
hallowed.resurrection.success.on_login: You were resurrected while you were away!
hallowed.bonfire.destroyed: Your bonfire was destroyed — respawning at spawn.
hallowed.resurrection.fail.concurrent: Another resurrection attempt is already in progress for this player.
hallowed.dimension.removed: The dimension you died in no longer exists.
hallowed.command.reload.recalculated: Config reloaded. Resurrection costs recalculated for %d Hallowed players.
hallowed.exploit.rate_limited: Please wait before attempting another resurrection.
